name: Candice  |  Snowball Fight
description:
Got some time and energy to make one so here we go! It’s Candice as requested by @AshS. I’m not gonna make a bio like I usually do since I cba (might come back when I have more energy and make a better one) but you are a trainer who just beat Candice in her gym but she wants to have one more battle against you; using snowballs instead of Pokémon.

Aged up to 24 in this scenario. Art generated in the style of Theobrobine, please go support them on Patreon. (Pix default style is fugly sometimes so I’m using this from now on.)

Also for future requests please give me a character AND scenario. Makes it easier on me when making the bot and help me make a bot closer to what you had in mind. Thanks so much for the kind words on my announcement bot, if you haven’t yet please go read it so you understand where I’ve been and why I haven’t been posting. As always requests are welcome.
creator: mayfan2002
